signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: We saw softer traffic in our factory stores, highlighting increasing pressure being felt by the value consumer.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: NIKE Digital declined 10% in the quarter...we missed our Q4 plan on softer traffic, higher promotions, and lower sales of certain classic footwear franchises.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We now expect fiscal 2025 reported revenue to be down mid-single digits, with the first half down high single digits...increased macro uncertainty, particularly in greater China, with uneven consumer trends continuing in EMEA.
